_notes: Caps are YOURS to set; defaults are conservative placeholders. kelly_fraction 0.25 = quarter-Kelly. Awards need a bigger edge because the Boot model is cruder (opposition-unadjusted shares). Golden Ball/Glove are never bet: no calibrated model exists for them. exact_score/totals/btts/spread ship OFF — exact-score cells are the model's thinnest claims; totals/btts/spread are better calibrated (mid-grid) but opt in deliberately.
